resume:
=== Abigail Rodriguez - Resume.pdf ===
Abigail Rodriguez 
abigailro0899655@gmail.com. 
https://www.linkedin.com/in/abigail-rodriguez-254b93202/ 

                                                                          929-922-1214 
Objective  
It is to explore and learn from each work experience and organization to develop myself as a person and a student. 

Leadership Experiences 

Graphic Design & Content Creator for MetaBronx 2021 - Present 
Metabronx teaches students graphic design skills and then provides them a platform to 
share their stories. 
www.theglassfiles.com/stories  
I write and create content on issues that affect the community. I share historical and global 
stories that are personal and meaningful to me on current events as well as personal 
interests like country music, poems, family stories, and other creative ideas. I train younger 
students on how to navigate the intricate internship application process and I'm part of the 
program manager. 

Volunteer for SPEAKHIRE 2021- 2022 
Non-profit organization that specializes in developing immigrant families to  become 
leaders in the workforce. 
speakhire.org 
I help students with their remote learning and mentor them to be successful in their online 
classes. 

Volunteer for Teen Outreach Program (TOP) at Crotona High School 
Community outreach program to support local teens and provide activities and resources 
for them to get involved with their peers. 
www.wcs.org  
I write and record original stories for children that they can listen to at home with their 
families. I help with outreach activities in the community like cleaning up the local parks 
and creating and posting flyers about upcoming events for local teens.  

Mentor for the Peer Group Connection (PGC) at Crotona High School  
A teacher-run volunteer program that matches upper grades with younger students for 
networking and mentoring. 
www.crotonaihs.org/for-family  
In the PGC leaders program we create fun and interactive programs and activities for 
younger Crotona students using platforms like Kahoot, Padlet and others to share their 
ideas and feelings and build relationships with fellow students. 

Intern for My bodega online  

My Bodega Online is a company that has created a platform designed for wineries that 
accelerates online ordering and delivery services. 
.http://www.mybodega.online  

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 In this work, a database consisting of general information about EBT stores / warehouses 
in the New York City metropolitan area was built, in which I had to use google maps to 
walk in different counties of New York and see which bodegas are on the list and which 
ones are not, just add them to the list or rank them. I even had to make calls to different 
bodegas to get essential information and see their behavior towards a customer. 

Skills   

- 
- 

- 
- 

Bilingual (Spanish and English) 
Technology:  

- 
- 

Proficient in Adobe Spark 
Proficient Google Suite 

Storytelling: I have written for Glass Files and produced children’s stories for Teen Outreach program.  
Public speaking: I recently presented to a class of 25+ students on my involvement in the PGC mentorship 
program. 

-  Overall, I am Christian,extremely studious and dedicated  

About Me 
Soy genuinamente creyente en Dios  y me gusta escribir historias “Jugar con  la imaginación y la realidad” 
. Actualmente  participo en la organización llamada Meta Bronx en las que me dirijo a diferentes escuelas a hablar de 
mis experiencias y motivar a los estudiantes de esta generación “ A hacer lo que el 99% no hace”  

Motivando a estudiantes que no tienen un inglés fluido en el que el lenguaje se nos hace una barrera sin embargo 
utilizar esa debilidad como un trampolín y desafiarte a ti mismo , es algo que me ha ayudado en mi crecimiento 
personal.
coach_notes: For a design career, prioritize learning Photoshop, Illustrator, and Figma—these are essential for creating visual content. Start with free tutorials on YouTube or platforms like Coursera, then practice by redesigning a non-profit's materials to combine your existing skills with new ones. Your bilingual and community outreach experience will make you a standout candidate once you build these technical foundations.

jobs.title: Events and Ministry Coordinator (Onsite, Volunteer)
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your leadership, organization, and teamwork skills are directly applicable to coordinating events and ministry activities. Bilingual ability is a strong asset for community engagement.
jobs.gaps: No specific experience in ministry or event planning mentioned. Volunteer role may require additional initiative to demonstrate capability.

jobs.title: A&F Co. Design Sophomore Summit - Summer 2026
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your design and creative skills align with the summit's focus on design. Bilingual and teamwork skills are beneficial.
jobs.gaps: No formal design education or portfolio mentioned. The summit likely targets current design students or recent graduates with strong design foundations.

jobs.title: Creative Designer (Graphics & Video)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your creative skills, design ability, and proficiency with Adobe (implied by 'adobe' in resume) match the core requirements. Bilingual could be a plus.
jobs.gaps: No specific experience in graphics or video production mentioned. Need to demonstrate a portfolio of design work and video editing skills.

jobs.title: Social-First Content & Design Specialist
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your creative and design skills, plus Google Suite proficiency, support content creation. Bilingual adds value for social media targeting diverse audiences.
jobs.gaps: No explicit social media or content strategy experience. Need to show understanding of social-first content and analytics.

jobs.title: Wine Steward PT
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your organization and teamwork skills are transferable to a retail environment. Bilingual could help with customer interactions.
jobs.gaps: No wine knowledge or hospitality experience. This role requires deep wine expertise and customer service skills not evident in resume.
